prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: reusable game card frame template
Primary request: a premium dark-fantasy assault card frame for an original game called Blood Rogue, inspired by the material richness of Monster Train cards but fully original.
Subject: a single full-face vertical card frame with no card text and no icon subject; the frame itself is the only subject.
Composition/framing: portrait 3:4 card face, centered and symmetrical, designed to be used as a background image under dynamic UI text and illustration. Leave a clearly defined top title plaque area, a central art window frame, a large lower parchment text well, and a narrow footer strip. Keep all of those areas visually blank enough to accept overlaid text and art.
Style/medium: painterly gothic dark-fantasy UI frame art, high-end deckbuilder card template.
Lighting/mood: blood-warm and severe, black iron and worn brass with ember-red lacquer accents.
Color palette: black iron, oxidized brass, dried blood red, ember orange, soot, parchment tan.
Materials/textures: carved metal trim, worn lacquer, scratched brass, waxed leather, old parchment, rivets, subtle occult engravings.
Constraints: no text, no numbers, no icons, no characters, no watermark. The art window should be empty and readable; the lower parchment text area should be clean and not busy. The center and lower thirds must remain usable for overlaid content.
Avoid: no skull centerpiece, no giant emblem in the middle, no perspective tilt, no glowing magic blast, no busy illustration in the art window, no copyrighted Monster Train or Diablo elements.

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: reusable game card frame template
Primary request: a premium dark-fantasy tactic card frame for an original game called Blood Rogue, inspired by the material richness of Monster Train cards but fully original.
Subject: a single full-face vertical card frame with no card text and no icon subject; the frame itself is the only subject.
Composition/framing: portrait 3:4 card face, centered and symmetrical, designed to be used as a background image under dynamic UI text and illustration. Leave a clearly defined top title plaque area, a central art window frame, a large lower parchment text well, and a narrow footer strip. Keep all of those areas visually blank enough to accept overlaid text and art.
Style/medium: painterly gothic dark-fantasy UI frame art, high-end deckbuilder card template.
Lighting/mood: colder and more ritual than the assault version, with dark steel, muted ivory parchment, tarnished silver, and subtle arcane indigo-green accents.
Color palette: blackened steel, ash silver, muted teal, dark indigo, parchment ivory, smoke gray.
Materials/textures: etched steel trim, worn lacquer, old parchment, iron filigree, wax seals, subtle runic grooves.
Constraints: no text, no numbers, no icons, no characters, no watermark. The art window should be empty and readable; the lower parchment text area should be clean and not busy. The center and lower thirds must remain usable for overlaid content.
Avoid: no giant crest in the middle, no perspective tilt, no bright neon magic, no busy illustration in the art window, no copyrighted Monster Train or Diablo elements.
